requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (GSO IEC 60335-2-24 under KUCAS, 240 V / 50 Hz)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（KUCAS下的GSO IEC 60335-2-24，240 V / 50 Hz）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（KUCAS下的GSO IEC 60335-2-24，240 V / 50 Hz）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances entering Kuwait must meet electrical-safety requirements assessed within KUCAS against the GSO-adopted safety standard GSO IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read with the general standard GSO IEC 60335-1. GSO adopts the IEC 60335 text as Gulf standards, which PAI references in the KUCAS technical evaluation. Key requirements cover protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, mechanical strength, earthing continuity, and appliance markings. Critically, the appliance must be rated and tested for the Kuwait single-phase grid of 240 V, 50 Hz — the 50 Hz frequency matches China's, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V, so the rating plate, internal components, and safety test conditions must reflect 240 V. Conformity is evidenced by an accredited (ISO/IEC 17025) test report feeding the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report, with a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity issued before customs release at Shuwaikh/Shuaiba.
summary.zh: 进入科威特的家用制冷器具须满足电气安全要求，在KUCAS框架内依据GSO采纳的安全标准GSO IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）评估，并与通用标准GSO IEC 60335-1结合使用。GSO将IEC 60335文本采纳为海湾标准，PAI在KUCAS技术评估中加以引用。核心要求涵盖防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、机械强度、接地连续性及器具标识。关键在于，器具须按科威特240 V、50 Hz单相电网标定并测试——50 Hz频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220 V，故铭牌、内部元件及安全测试条件须反映240 V。符合性以认可（ISO/IEC 17025）检测报告为证据并纳入KUCAS技术评估报告，且在舒维赫/舒艾巴口岸海关放行前签发逐批货物符合性证书。
summary.zht: 進入科威特的家用製冷器具須滿足電氣安全要求，在KUCAS框架內依據GSO採納的安全標準GSO IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）評估，並與通用標準GSO IEC 60335-1結合使用。GSO將IEC 60335文本採納為海灣標準，PAI在KUCAS技術評估中加以引用。核心要求涵蓋防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、機械強度、接地連續性及器具標識。關鍵在於，器具須按科威特240 V、50 Hz單相電網標定並測試——50 Hz頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220 V，故銘牌、內部元件及安全測試條件須反映240 V。符合性以認可（ISO/IEC 17025）檢測報告為證據並納入KUCAS技術評估報告，且在舒維赫/舒艾巴口岸海關放行前簽發逐批貨物符合性證書。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (GSO adoption of IEC 60335-2-24; referenced within KUCAS)
GSO IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
KUCAS (Public Authority for Industry, PAI) — safety assessed within the Technical Evaluation Report; per-shipment Certificate of Conformity required
Grid rating: 240 V, 50 Hz single phase (Kuwait — Ministry of Electricity and Water, MEW)
ISO/IEC 17025 accredited test report — evidence basis

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with Chinese national deviations, read with GB 4706.1 (general requirements). GB 4706.13 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before domestic sale, tested at the Chinese 220 V / 50 Hz rating. Because both GB 4706.13 and GSO IEC 60335-2-24 descend from IEC 60335-2-24, the technical content is closely aligned, but Chinese CCC test reports issued at 220 V are not directly accepted by PAI for KUCAS, and the rating must be re-evaluated for the Kuwait 240 V supply.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并含中国国家偏差，与GB 4706.1（通用要求）结合使用。GB 4706.13为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度监督执行；产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在国内销售，并按中国220 V / 50 Hz额定值测试。由于GB 4706.13与GSO IEC 60335-2-24同源于IEC 60335-2-24，技术内容高度一致，但按220 V出具的中国CCC检测报告不被PAI直接接受用于KUCAS，且额定值须按科威特240 V供电重新评估。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並含中國國家偏差，與GB 4706.1（通用要求）結合使用。GB 4706.13為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度監督執行；產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在國內銷售，並按中國220 V / 50 Hz額定值測試。由於GB 4706.13與GSO IEC 60335-2-24同源於IEC 60335-2-24，技術內容高度一致，但按220 V出具的中國CCC檢測報告不被PAI直接接受用於KUCAS，且額定值須按科威特240 V供電重新評估。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA; tested at 220 V)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: The technical content gap is limited because both standards descend from IEC 60335-2-24, but several real gaps remain: (1) Voltage rating — Chinese CCC reports are issued at 220 V, whereas Kuwait operates at 240 V, 50 Hz; the rating plate, voltage-dependent components, and dielectric/thermal test conditions must be re-evaluated and declared at 240 V even though the 50 Hz frequency matches. (2) KUCAS routing — safety results must feed the PAI Technical Evaluation Report and support a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity; a standalone Chinese CCC certificate does not satisfy KUCAS. (3) Report recognition — a CNAS/CCC report (or an IECEE CB Scheme report to IEC 60335-2-24) may need re-issuance, mapping to the GSO standard reference, or recognition by a KUCAS-recognised conformity assessment body; an IECEE CB report covering the relevant deviations can reduce re-testing scope. (4) Arabic-language documentation and markings may be required at point of sale.
gap.zh: 技术内容差距有限，因为两个标准均源自IEC 60335-2-24，但仍存在若干实际差距：（1）电压额定——中国CCC报告按220 V出具，而科威特为240 V、50 Hz；铭牌、电压相关元件及介电/热测试条件须按240 V重新评估并声明，尽管50 Hz频率相同。（2）KUCAS流程——安全结果须纳入PAI技术评估报告并支撑逐批货物符合性证书；单独的中国CCC证书不满足KUCAS。（3）报告承认——CNAS/CCC报告（或依据IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB体系报告）可能需要重新签发、映射至GSO标准依据或由KUCAS认可的合格评定机构予以承认；涵盖相关偏差的IECEE CB报告可缩减重新检测范围。（4）销售点可能须提供阿拉伯文文件和标识。
gap.zht: 技術內容差距有限，因為兩個標準均源自IEC 60335-2-24，但仍存在若干實際差距：（1）電壓額定——中國CCC報告按220 V出具，而科威特為240 V、50 Hz；銘牌、電壓相關元件及介電/熱測試條件須按240 V重新評估並聲明，儘管50 Hz頻率相同。（2）KUCAS流程——安全結果須納入PAI技術評估報告並支撐逐批貨物符合性證書；單獨的中國CCC證書不滿足KUCAS。（3）報告承認——CNAS/CCC報告（或依據IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB體系報告）可能需要重新簽發、映射至GSO標準依據或由KUCAS認可的合格評定機構予以承認；涵蓋相關偏差的IECEE CB報告可縮減重新檢測範圍。（4）銷售點可能須提供阿拉伯文文件和標識。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety to GSO IEC 60335-2-24 is assessed within KUCAS; a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity is required before customs release; appliance must be rated for 240 V / 50 Hz
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA; tested at 220 V

source.publisher: Public Authority for Industry (PAI) — KUCAS, Kuwait / GSO

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety to GSO IEC 60335-2-24 is mandatory within KUCAS for household refrigerators in Kuwait. Because GB 4706.13 shares the IEC 60335-2-24 lineage the technical gap is small, but Chinese CCC data at 220 V is not directly accepted: the appliance must be re-evaluated and declared for the Kuwait 240 V / 50 Hz grid, results routed through a KUCAS-recognised conformity assessment body, mapped to the GSO standard, and supported by a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity. An IECEE CB report can reduce re-testing scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据GSO IEC 60335-2-24的电气安全在KUCAS内对科威特家用电冰箱为强制要求。由于GB 4706.13同源于IEC 60335-2-24，技术差距较小，但按220 V出具的中国CCC数据不被直接接受：器具须按科威特240 V / 50 Hz电网重新评估并声明，结果经KUCAS认可的合格评定机构处理、映射至GSO标准，并辅以逐批货物符合性证书。IECEE CB报告可缩减重新检测范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據GSO IEC 60335-2-24的電氣安全在KUCAS內對科威特家用電冰箱為強制要求。由於GB 4706.13同源於IEC 60335-2-24，技術差距較小，但按220 V出具的中國CCC數據不被直接接受：器具須按科威特240 V / 50 Hz電網重新評估並聲明，結果經KUCAS認可的合格評定機構處理、映射至GSO標準，並輔以逐批貨物符合性證書。IECEE CB報告可縮減重新檢測範圍。
